req.title: Hr-Admin deletes policy-document
req.statement: An authenticated hr-admin shall be able to delete a policy-document through the UI form. Mandatory fields must be validated and an audit record must be written on success.

tests.name: naive_case
tests.executable:
```python
"""
pytest tests for HR-Admin Policy Document Deletion
Requirement: An authenticated hr-admin shall be able to delete a policy-document
through the UI form. Mandatory fields must be validated and an audit record
must be written on success.
"""

import pytest
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, call
from datetime import datetime, timezone


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@pytest.fixture
def hr_admin_user():
    """Authenticated HR-Admin user."""
    return {
        "id": "user-001",
        "username": "jane.doe",
        "email": "jane.doe@example.com",
        "roles": ["hr-admin"],
        "is_authenticated": True,
    }


@pytest.fixture
def non_admin_user():
    """Authenticated user without hr-admin role."""
    return {
        "id": "user-002",
        "username": "john.smith",
        "email": "john.smith@example.com",
        "roles": ["employee"],
        "is_authenticated": True,
    }


@pytest.fixture
def unauthenticated_user():
    """Unauthenticated / anonymous user."""
    return {
        "id": None,
        "username": None,
        "roles": [],
        "is_authenticated": False,
    }


@pytest.fixture
def existing_policy_document():
    """A policy document that exists in the system."""
    return {
        "id": "doc-abc-123",
        "title": "Remote Work Policy",
        "version": "2.1",
        "status": "active",
        "created_by": "user-001",
        "created_at": "2024-01-15T10:00:00Z",
    }


@pytest.fixture
def valid_delete_form_data(existing_policy_document):
    """Valid form payload required for deletion."""
    return {
        "document_id": existing_policy_document["id"],
        "reason": "Policy superseded by updated version",
        "confirmed": True,   # explicit confirmation checkbox
    }


@pytest.fixture
def mock_policy_repository():
    repo = MagicMock()
    repo.find_by_id.return_value = {
        "id": "doc-abc-123",
        "title": "Remote Work Policy",
        "version": "2.1",
        "status": "active",
    }
    repo.delete.return_value = True
    return repo


@pytest.fixture
def mock_audit_service():
    return MagicMock()


@pytest.fixture
def mock_auth_service():
    svc = MagicMock()
    svc.is_authenticated.side_effect = lambda u: u["is_authenticated"]
    svc.has_role.side_effect = lambda u, role: role in u["roles"]
    return svc


@pytest.fixture
def delete_policy_use_case(
    mock_policy_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_auth_service
):
    """
    Thin application service that orchestrates the deletion.
    Replace with your real import once the code exists.
    """
    from policy_management.use_cases import DeletePolicyDocumentUseCase  # noqa: F401 – production import

    return DeletePolicyDocumentUseCase(
        policy_repository=mock_policy_repository,
        audit_service=mock_audit_service,
        auth_service=mock_auth_service,
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper – import guard so the test file can be *collected* without
# production code present (tests will xfail gracefully).
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def _import_use_case():
    try:
        from policy_management.use_cases import DeletePolicyDocumentUseCase
        return DeletePolicyDocumentUseCase
    except ImportError:
        return None


# ===========================================================================
# 1. AUTHENTICATION & AUTHORISATION TESTS
# ===========================================================================

class TestAuthentication:

    def test_unauthenticated_user_cannot_delete(
        self,
        unauthenticated_user,
        valid_delete_form_data,
        mock_policy_repository,
        mock_audit_service,
        mock_auth_service,
    ):
        """An unauthenticated request must be rejected with an auth error."""
        UseCase = _import_use_case()
        if UseCase is None:
            pytest.xfail("Production code not yet available")

        use_case = UseCase(mock_policy_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_auth_service)

        with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:
            use_case.execute(user=unauthenticated_user, form_data=valid_delete_form_data)

        assert exc_info.type.__name__ in (
            "AuthenticationError", "PermissionDeniedError", "UnauthorizedError"
        )
        mock_policy_repository.delete.assert_not_called()
        mock_audit_service.log.assert_not_called()

    def test_non_admin_user_cannot_delete(
        self,
        non_admin_user,
        valid_delete_form_data,
        mock_policy_repository,
        mock_audit_service,
        mock_auth_service,
    ):
        """An authenticated employee (not hr-admin) must be denied."""
        UseCase = _import_use_case()
        if UseCase is None:
            pytest.xfail("Production code not yet available")

        use_case = UseCase(mock_policy_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_auth_service)

        with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:
            use_case.execute(user=non_admin_user, form_data=valid_delete_form_data)

        assert exc_info.type.__name__ in (
            "PermissionDeniedError", "ForbiddenError", "UnauthorizedError"
        )
        mock_policy_repository.delete.assert_not_called()
        mock_audit_service.log.assert_not_called()

    def test_hr_admin_is_permitted_to_initiate_deletion(
        self,
        hr_admin_user,
        valid_delete_form_data,
        mock_policy_repository,
        mock_audit_service,
        mock_auth_service,
    ):
        """An hr-admin must be allowed past the auth gate."""
        UseCase = _import_use_case()
        if UseCase is None:
            pytest.xfail("Production code not yet available")

        use_case = UseCase(mock_policy_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_auth_service)

        # Should not raise an auth exception
        try:
            use_case.execute(user=hr_admin_user, form_data=valid_delete_form_data)
        except Exception as exc:
            assert exc.__class__.__name__ not in (
                "AuthenticationError", "PermissionDeniedError",
                "ForbiddenError", "UnauthorizedError"
            ), f"Unexpected auth error raised: {exc}"

class TestMandatoryFieldValidation:

    @pytest.mark.parametrize("missing_field", ["document_id", "reason", "confirmed"])
    def test_missing_mandatory_field_raises_validation_error(
        self,
        hr_admin_user,
        valid_delete_form_data,
        mock_policy_repository,
        mock_audit_service,
        mock_auth_service,
        missing_field,
    ):
        """Each mandatory field must individually cause a validation error when absent."""
        UseCase = _import_use_case()
        if UseCase is None:
            pytest.xfail("Production code not yet available")

        use_case = UseCase(mock_policy_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_auth_service)
        bad_data = {k: v for k, v in valid_delete_form_data.items() if k != missing_field}

        with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:
            use_case.execute(user=hr_admin_user, form_data=bad_data)

        assert exc_info.type.__name__ in ("ValidationError", "FormValidationError", "ValueError")
        mock_policy_repository.delete.assert_not_called()

    def test_empty_document_id_raises_validation_error(
        self,
        hr_admin_user,
        valid_delete_form_data,
        mock_policy_repository,
        mock_audit_service,
        mock_auth_service,
    ):
        """An empty string document_id must fail validation."""
        UseCase = _import_use_case()
        if UseCase is None:
            pytest.xfail("Production code not yet available")

        use_case = UseCase(mock_policy_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_auth_service)
        bad_data = {**valid_delete_form_data, "document_id": ""}

        with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:
            use_case.execute(user=hr_admin_user, form_data=bad_data)

        assert exc_info.type.__name__ in ("ValidationError", "FormValidationError", "ValueError")
        mock_policy_repository.delete.assert_not_called()

    def test_empty_reason_raises_validation_error(
        self,
        hr_admin_user,
        valid_delete_form_data,
        mock_policy_repository,
        mock_audit_service,
        mock_auth_service,
    ):
        """An empty reason string must fail validation."""
        UseCase = _import_use_case()
        if UseCase is None:
            pytest.xfail("Production code not yet available")

        use_case = UseCase(mock_policy_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_auth_service)
        bad_data = {**valid_delete_form_data, "reason": ""}

        with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:
            use_case.execute(user=hr_admin_user, form_data=bad_data)

        assert exc_info.type.__name__ in ("ValidationError", "FormValidationError", "ValueError")
        mock_policy_repository.delete.assert_not_called()

    def test_unconfirmed_deletion_raises_validation_error(
        self,
        hr_admin_user,
        valid_delete_form_data,
        mock_policy_repository,
        mock_audit_service,
        mock_auth_service,
    ):
        """Deletion without explicit confirmation (confirmed=False) must fail."""
        UseCase = _import_use_case()
        if UseCase is None:
            pytest.xfail("Production code not yet available")

        use_case = UseCase(mock_policy_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_auth_service)
        bad_data = {**valid_delete_form_data, "confirmed": False}

        with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:
            use_case.execute(user=hr_admin_user, form_data=bad_data)

        assert exc_info.type.__name__ in (
            "ValidationError", "FormValidationError", "ValueError", "ConfirmationRequiredError"
        )
        mock_policy_repository.delete.assert_not_called()

    def test_whitespace_only_reason_raises_validation_error(
        self,
        hr_admin_user,
        valid_delete_form_data,
        mock_policy_repository,
        mock_audit_service,
        mock_auth_service,
    ):
        """A reason containing only whitespace must be treated as empty."""
        UseCase = _import_use_case()
        if UseCase is None:
            pytest.xfail("Production code not yet available")

        use_case = UseCase(mock_policy_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_auth_service)
        bad_data = {**valid_delete_form_data, "reason": "   "}

        with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:
            use_case.execute(user=hr_admin_user, form_data=bad_data)

        assert exc_info.type.__name__ in ("ValidationError", "FormValidationError", "ValueError")
        mock_policy_repository.delete.assert_not_called()

    def test_validation_error_contains_field_name(
        self,
        hr_admin_user,
        valid_delete_form_data,
        mock_policy_repository,
        mock_audit_service,
        mock_auth_service,
    ):
        """Validation error payload must identify which field failed."""
        UseCase = _import_use_case()
        if UseCase is None:
            pytest.xfail("Production code not yet available")

        use_case = UseCase(mock_policy_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_auth_service)
        bad_data = {**valid_delete_form_data, "reason": ""}

        with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:
            use_case.execute(user=hr_admin_user, form_data=bad_data)

        error_repr = str(exc_info.value).lower()
        assert "reason" in error_repr, (
            f"Expected 'reason' in error message, got: {exc_info.value}"
        )

class TestDocumentExistence:

    def test_delete_non_existent_document_raises_not_found(
        self,
        hr_admin_user,
        valid_delete_form_data,
        mock_policy_repository,
        mock_audit_service,
        mock_auth_service,
    ):
        """Attempting to delete a document that does not exist must raise NotFound."""
        UseCase = _import_use_case()
        if UseCase is None:
            pytest.xfail("Production code not yet available")

        mock_policy_repository.find_by_id.return_value = None  # document absent
        use_case = UseCase(mock_policy_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_auth_service)

        with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:
            use_case.execute(user=hr_admin_user, form_data=valid_delete_form_data)

        assert exc_info.type.__name__ in ("NotFoundError", "DocumentNotFoundError", "LookupError")
        mock_policy_repository.delete.assert_not_called()
        mock_audit_service.log.assert_not_called()

    def test_repository_queried_with_correct_document_id(
        self,
        hr_admin_user,
        valid_delete_form_data,
        mock_policy_repository,
        mock_audit_service,
        mock_auth_service,
    ):
        """The repository must be called with the document_id from the form."""
        UseCase = _import_use_case()
        if UseCase is None:
            pytest.xfail("Production code not yet available")

        use_case = UseCase(mock_policy_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_auth_service)
        use_case.execute(user=hr_admin_user, form_data=valid_delete_form_data)

        mock_policy_repository.find_by_id.assert_called_once_with(
            valid_delete_form_data["document_id"]
        )

class TestSuccessfulDeletion:

    def test_successful_deletion_calls_repository_delete(
        self,
        hr_admin_user,
        valid_delete_form_data,
        mock_policy_repository,
        mock_audit_service,
        mock_auth_service,
    ):
        """On success the repository delete method must be called exactly once."""
        UseCase = _import_use_case()
        if UseCase is None:
            pytest.xfail("Production code not yet available")

        use_case = UseCase(mock_policy_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_auth_service)
        use_case.execute(user=hr_admin_user, form_data=valid_delete_form_data)

        mock_policy_repository.delete.assert_called_once_with(
            valid_delete_form_data["document_id"]
        )

    def test_successful_deletion_returns_success_indicator(
        self,
        hr_admin_user,
        valid_delete_form_data,
        mock_policy_repository,
        mock_audit_service,
        mock_auth_service,
    ):
        """The use-case must signal success to the UI layer."""
        UseCase = _import_use_case()
        if UseCase is None:
            pytest.xfail("Production code not yet available")

        use_case = UseCase(mock_policy_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_auth_service)
        result = use_case.execute(user=hr_admin_user, form_data=valid_delete_form_data)

        assert result is not None
        # Accept a boolean True, a dict with success key, or a result object
        if isinstance(result, bool):
            assert result is True
        elif isinstance(result, dict):
            assert result.get("success") is True
        else:
            assert getattr(result, "success", None) is True or \
                   getattr(result, "status", None) in ("deleted", "success")

class TestAuditRecord:

    def test_audit_log_written_on_successful_deletion(
        self,

        valid_delete_form_data,
        mock_policy_repository,

        use_case = UseCase(mock_policy_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_auth_service)
        use_case.execute(user=hr_admin_user, form_data=valid_delete_form_data)

        mock_audit_service.log.assert_called_once()

    def test_audit_record_contains_actor_id(
        self,
        hr_admin_user,
        valid_delete_form_data,
        mock_policy_repository,
        mock_audit_service,
        mock_auth_service,
    ):

        use_case = UseCase(mock_policy_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_auth_service)
        use_case.execute(user=hr_admin_user, form_data=valid_delete_form_data)

        call_kwargs = mock_audit_service.log.call_args
        audit_payload = _extract_audit_payload(call_kwargs)
        assert audit_payload.get("actor_id") == hr_admin_user["id"], (
            f"Expected actor_id={hr_admin_user['id']}, got: {audit_payload}"
        )

# 6. UI / FORM INTEGRATION TESTS  (using a test client / page object)

class TestUIFormIntegration:
    """
    These tests exercise the HTTP layer.
    Swap `app` and `client` fixtures for your actual web framework
    (Flask test client, Django test client, FastAPI TestClient, etc.).
    """

    @pytest.fixture
    def app_client(self):
        """
        Example: replace with real app test client.
        e.g. from myapp import create_app
             app = create_app({"TESTING": True, "DATABASE": ":memory:"})
             with app.test_client() as client: yield client
        """
        pytest.skip("Replace this fixture with your real app test client")

    def test_delete_form_renders_for_hr_admin(self, app_client, hr_admin_user, existing_policy_document):
        """The delete confirmation form must be accessible to an hr-admin."""
        # Simulate session / token authentication here
        response = app_client.get(
            f"/policy-documents/{existing_policy_document['id']}/delete",
            headers={"X-User-Id": hr_admin_user["id"], "X-User-Role": "hr-admin"},
        )
        assert response.status_code == 200
        assert b"document_id" in response.data
        assert b"reason" in response.data
        assert b"confirmed" in response.data

    def test_delete_form_redirects_unauthenticated_user(self, app_client, existing_policy_document):
        """An unauthenticated GET must redirect to the login page (3xx)."""
        response = app_client.get(
            f"/policy-documents/{existing_policy_document['id']}/delete"
        )
        assert response.status_code in (302, 401, 403)

    def test_successful_form_submission_redirects(
        self, app_client, hr_admin_user, valid_delete_form_data
    ):
        """A valid POST must result in a redirect (PRG pattern)."""
        response = app_client.post(
            "/policy-documents/delete",
            data=valid_delete_form_data,
            headers={"X-User-Id": hr_admin_user["id"], "X-User-Role": "hr-admin"},
        )
        assert response.status_code in (302, 303)

    def test_invalid_form_submission_shows_errors(
        self, app_client, hr_admin_user, valid_delete_form_data
    ):
        """A POST missing mandatory fields must re-render the form with error messages."""
        bad_data = {k: v for k, v in valid_delete_form_data.items() if k != "reason"}
        response = app_client.post(
            "/policy-documents/delete",
            data=bad_data,
            headers={"X-User-Id": hr_admin_user["id"], "X-User-Role": "hr-admin"},
        )
        assert response.status_code == 200  # form re-rendered, not redirected
        assert b"reason" in response.data   # field name mentioned in error


# ===========================================================================
# 7. IDEMPOTENCY / EDGE CASES
# ===========================================================================

class TestEdgeCases:

    def test_already_deleted_document_raises_not_found(
        self,
        hr_admin_user,
        valid_delete_form_data,
        mock_policy_repository,
        mock_audit_service,
        mock_auth_service,
    ):
        """Deleting the same document twice must raise NotFound on the second attempt."""
        UseCase = _import_use_case()
        if UseCase is None:
            pytest.xfail("Production code not yet available")

        use_case = UseCase(mock_policy_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_auth_service)

        # First deletion succeeds
        use_case.execute(user=hr_admin_user, form_data=valid_delete_form_data)

        # Repository now returns nothing for subsequent lookups
        mock_policy_repository.find_by_id.return_value = None

        with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:
            use_case.execute(user=hr_admin_user, form_data=valid_delete_form_data)

        assert exc_info.type.__name__ in ("NotFoundError", "DocumentNotFoundError", "LookupError")

    def test_sql_injection_in_document_id_is_rejected(
        self,
        hr_admin_user,
        valid_delete_form_data,
        mock_policy_repository,
        mock_audit_service,
        mock_auth_service,
    ):
        """A document_id containing SQL injection payload must fail validation."""
        UseCase = _import_use_case()
        if UseCase is None:
            pytest.xfail("Production code not yet available")

        use_case = UseCase(mock_policy_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_auth_service)
        bad_data = {**valid_delete_form_data, "document_id": "1; DROP TABLE policy_documents;--"}

        with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:
            use_case.execute(user=hr_admin_user, form_data=bad_data)

        assert exc_info.type.__name__ in (
            "ValidationError", "FormValidationError", "ValueError", "NotFoundError"
        )
        mock_policy_repository.delete.assert_not_called()

        mock_policy_repository.delete.assert_not_called()
